title: aster altaicus var. canescens
intro: Aster altaicus var. canescens, also known as white aster or hairy white aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory and digestive health. Aster altaicus var. canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor health problems.
